ques: What is the current Text-to-3D model with the highest number of downloads and tell me are there Spaces that use the model.
answer: The Text-to-3D model with the highest downloads is microsoft/TRELLIS-text-xlarge (~7.2k / 7,196 downloads last month). Yes, there are Spaces that use it — 9 Spaces, including yejunliang23/ShapLLM-Omni, PUM4CH3N/TRELLIS_TextTo3D, souging/TRELLIS_TextTo3D, PlagueEvgeny/TextTo3D, mlactimel/tr, RihemXX/TRELLIS_TextTo3D, wupulalu/ShapLLM-Omni, and anshulm239/3D-test (+1 more).
